hypothesis: If trained on the AIMNet2-optimized ChEMBL3D dataset and equipped with stereochemistry-aware diffusion graph augmentations, then the LoQI model will generate conformers for diverse drug-like molecules—including high-rotatable and macrocyclic compounds—that reproduce DFT-level relative energies and stereochemistry while achieving lower RMSD, lower relaxation energy, and better topology preservation than existing conformer generators.
